state.triage:raw_exception_data:
## Exception Details
- Event ID: direct-input
- Source: manual_entry
- Raw content: EMERGENCY: Chemical tanker overturned on NH8 near Vapi, Gujarat at 14:20 IST. Driver injured and admitted to local hospital. Chemical spill reported on
  highway — substance identified as industrial solvent. NHAI has closed a 2km stretch. Our 3 trucks are stuck behind the blockade with perishable cargo.
  Police and fire services on scene. PESO has been notified. Estimated road clearance: 6-8 hours minimum.

## Company Context
Not available

## Initial Observations
- Key entities mentioned: Chemical tanker, NH8, Vapi, Gujarat, NHAI, Police, fire services, PESO, 3 trucks
- Time-sensitive indicators: 14:20 IST, Estimated road clearance: 6-8 hours minimum, perishable cargo
- Safety-related signals: Chemical tanker overturned, Driver injured, Chemical spill reported, industrial solvent, Police and fire services on scene
